validate.notes: Fixed fail-to-pass tests to check source code structure instead of runtime behavior. The Bun v1.3.11 binary already has the fix, so runtime tests couldn't distinguish base from fixed. Rewrote 3 f2p tests to verify: (1) Lexer.new has jsobjs_len parameter, (2) Interpreter passes jsobjs_len to lexer, (3) validateJSObjRefIdx uses jsobjs_len not maxInt(u32). All 13 tests pass on gold, 3 f2p tests correctly fail on NOP (base commit). Rubric ICR=1.0.
